name: codetokens-monitor
description: Live token usage and cost dashboard for AI coding assistants, shown natively in a VS Code panel.

commands.title: CodeTokens Monitor: Push usage to central server now
CodeTokens Monitor: Sync pricing from central server

tokenscope.statusBar.enabled.description: Show today's cost in the status bar.

tokenscope.historyDaysBack.description: How many days back to scan JSONL for historical cost.

tokenscope.alert.enabled.description: Warn when a session's context window is nearly full (toast + status bar color).

tokenscope.alert.thresholdPct.description: Context-window usage percentage that triggers the warning.

tokenscope.contextWindowOverride.description: Override the per-session context window size (tokens) for Claude sessions. 0 = auto-detect from model (opus/sonnet/fable = 1M, haiku = 200K). Set e.g. 200000 if your Claude Code runs a 200K window.

tokenscope.central.enabled.description: Push aggregated usage (apikey only) to a central internal server. Local dashboard is unaffected. See server/README.md.

tokenscope.central.url.description: Central server base URL, e.g. http://server-noi-bo:8787 . LAN/VPN only.

tokenscope.central.ingestKey.description: Shared internal token sent as X-Ingest-Key. NOT your Claude/OpenAI key.

tokenscope.central.pushIntervalMin.description: Fallback push interval (minutes) if file-watch misses an event. Auth is captured per-delta at read time.

tokenscope.owner.description: Optional override for the reported member identity. Empty = OS user + org.

tokenscope.projectMap.description: Map a repo path/slug OR key:<keyHash> to an enterprise project name. e.g. { "d:/Work/Projects/BTA": "SunStory-BTA", "key:3f9a1c22": "ProjectX" }
